response.step_by_step_log: The video shows a 3D virtual performance. On-screen text "ギラギラ" (Gira Gira) appears at the start. Searched for "Gira Gira Ado Japanese and English lyrics" to find the lyrics and performer information. Confirmed Ouro Kronii is the performer.
response.global_summary: A 3D virtual performance of the song "Gira Gira" by the virtual YouTuber Ouro Kronii. The performance includes choreography, virtual stage effects, and a pink mascot character on stage.

scenes.description: Ouro Kronii performs "Gira Gira" on a 3D stage with blue lighting effects and a floating pink character. The title "ギラギラ" appears at the top left.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
あーもう本当になんて素晴らしき世界
んで今日もまた己の醜悪さに惑う
だのに人を好きって思う気持ちだけは
一丁前にあるから悶えてるんでしょう
Ugly 正直言って私の顔は
そう神様が左手で描いたみたい
必然この世にあるラブソングは
どれ一つ絶対私向けなんかじゃないでしょ
使い道のない口紅
憐れみを恋に欲しいままに
スパンコールの傘 豚で身を守る
愛されないくらいなんだ
ギラギラ 輝いて私は夜を飲み
Rap, tap, tap, tap
今に見てろこの luv
目に染みるは1ミリグラムの花火
Drag on, drag on
なんてファニー この世はミザリー
ギラギラ ギラギラ

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Ah, truly, what a wonderful world
And so, once again today, my own unsightliness confuses me
And yet, this feeling of wanting to be loved by another
Is what makes me suffer
Ugly, honestly, my face is as if
It were drawn by God with his left hand
Therefore, I’m shivering in this irrational world
Where not a single love song is meant for me
I’m just an unused lipstick
Wanting to keep my pity, as it is
Protecting myself with a sequin umbrella
I can’t believe how unlovable I am
Gira Gira, shining brightly, I swallow the night
Rap, tap, tap, tap
Just you wait, this luv
It stings my eyes, a single milligram of fireworks
Drag on, drag on
What a funny, this world is misery
Gira Gira, Gira Gira
Gira Gira
Gira Gira
Gira Gira
Ah, now I’m full of flowers
Gira Gira, Gira Gira
I can't just be who I am, nobody can
